nasb.text: besides that from the traders and the wares of the merchants and all the kings of the Arabs and the governors of the country.

esv.text: besides that which came from the explorers and from the business of the merchants, and from all the kings of the west and from the governors of the land.

cnv.text: 另外，還有從商人和行商的課稅，阿拉伯諸王和國內省長的收入。

ccb.text: 此外，还有商人、阿拉伯诸王和国中各总督送来的贡税。
